title: User Authentication Success
description: Verify that user can successfully log in using correct credentials via authentication modal and context.

steps.description: Open the authentication modal.
Input valid username and password.
Submit login form.
Confirm user is authenticated and redirected to dashboard.
Check that authentication context is properly set.

title: User Authentication Failure
description: Verify that login attempt fails for invalid credentials and error messages appear within modal.

steps.description: Open the authentication modal.
Input invalid username or password.
Submit login form.
Confirm login is rejected.
Verify relevant error message is displayed inside the modal.
Ensure authentication context state remains unset.

title: Dashboard Rendering and Metrics Display
description: Verify dashboard and all business metrics components render correctly with valid data.

steps.description: Log in successfully.
Navigate to main dashboard page.
Confirm dashboard layout loads including header, sidebar navigation, and main content.
Verify market, competitor, financial, risk, and brand identity analysis components are rendered.
Verify all displayed metrics contain realistic and consistent data.

title: SWOT Analysis Component Rendering
description: Validate SWOT analysis display component renders all strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to SWOT analysis section on dashboard.
Verify all SWOT categories (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) are displayed distinctly.
Confirm data in each category matches input or backend source.

title: Undo/Redo Hook Functionality
description: Test undo and redo operations within an editable business analysis input form using custom hook.

steps.description: Input sample data into business input form.
Modify input fields.
Execute undo operation.
Confirm form fields revert to prior state.
Execute redo operation.
Confirm form fields return to modified state.

title: Internationalization Language Switching
description: Verify language switcher component toggles UI content among English, French, and Arabic accurately.

steps.description: Load application with default language (English).
Verify UI text shows in English.
Switch language to French via language switcher.
Confirm all relevant UI text updates to French localized strings.
Switch language to Arabic via language switcher.
Confirm all relevant UI text updates to Arabic localized strings and right-to-left layout formats where applicable.

title: Google Gemini AI Service Integration Success
description: Test successful integration and response handling when invoking Google Gemini API for business insights.

steps.description: Provide valid business data inputs.
Trigger AI insights generation via Gemini service.
Confirm API call is made to mock Gemini API and returns expected AI analysis data.
Verify AI-generated insights are displayed correctly on dashboard components.

title: Google Gemini API Error Handling
description: Verify robust error handling and user feedback if Gemini API returns error or times out.

steps.description: Simulate Gemini API failure or timeout response.
Trigger AI insights generation call.
Confirm error boundary or message component captures API error.
Verify user receives a clear, actionable error notification without app crash.

title: Error Boundaries Capture and Display Errors
description: Test that React error boundaries catch rendering or runtime errors and display user-friendly messages.

steps.description: Force a runtime error in a child component of dashboard.
Verify error boundary catches the error and prevents app crash.
Confirm user friendly error message is displayed in UI.

title: Business Data Input Form Validation and Submission
description: Ensure business data input form accepts valid input, performs client validation, and submits successfully.

steps.description: Open business data input form.
Fill in all required fields with valid data.
Check that submit button is enabled after valid input.
Submit form.
Verify backend API is called with correct data payload.
Confirm success toast notification appears.

title: Business Data Input Form Validation Errors
description: Ensure invalid or missing inputs prevent form submission and show validation errors.

steps.description: Open business data input form.
Leave required fields empty or input invalid data formats.
Verify validation error messages appear next to invalid fields.
Confirm submit button is disabled or submission blocked.

title: Toast Notifications Appear on User Actions
description: Verify toast notifications are displayed appropriately on user actions such as form submission, errors, and language switch.

steps.description: Perform a successful data submission.
Confirm success toast notification appears and disappears after timeout.
Trigger an error condition manually.
Confirm error toast notification appears with correct message.
Change application language.
Verify informational toast, if any, respects current locale.

title: Export Controls Data Export Integrity
description: Test export functionality exports current analysis results correctly in expected format and data integrity is maintained.

steps.description: Navigate to export controls component.
Trigger data export operation.
Verify exported file contains accurate and complete analysis results.
Confirm export file format matches specification.

title: Loading States with Spinners and Skeletons
description: Ensure loading spinners and skeleton components display during data fetching or processing states.

steps.description: Start a data fetch operation on dashboard and business modules.
Confirm loading spinner is visible during fetch.
Check skeleton components render appropriately in place of data until loading finishes.

title: Backend API Endpoint Unit and Integration Tests
description: Validate correctness of backend NestJS API endpoints for user, analysis, ventures, and subscription modules through unit and integration tests.

steps.description: Execute unit tests covering each API endpoint controller and service logic.
Verify correct status codes and response payloads returned for valid requests.
Execute integration tests involving real Prisma database operations and API calls.
Ensure database interaction correctness and rollback behavior for error cases.

title: State Management Hook Persistence
description: Test custom persisted state hooks correctly save and load state data across sessions.

steps.description: Modify state using custom persisted state hook.
Confirm updated state is saved to persistent storage.
Reload application or component.
Verify persisted state is restored correctly on load.

title: Real-time Updates via WebSocket
description: Confirm that real-time updates are delivered through WebSocket connection for collaborative analysis workflows.

steps.description: Establish WebSocket connection after user login.
Trigger data change from one client/session.
Confirm other connected clients receive updates in real time.
Verify UI components update accordingly without manual refresh.

title: End-to-End Workflow Testing with Playwright
description: Execute and verify full user workflows including login, dashboard access, data input, AI insights generation, language switching, undo/redo, and export via Playwright E2E tests.

steps.description: Run Playwright E2E script covering login and authentication flow.
Navigate main dashboard and verify component load.
Perform data input, triggering AI analysis generation.
Validate undo and redo feature on input forms.
Switch languages using language switcher.
Trigger data export and verify success.
Confirm all steps complete without errors and UI behaves as expected.

title: Performance Benchmark of Dashboard Loading
description: Measure dashboard load times under different data volume scenarios to ensure responsiveness within acceptable thresholds.

steps.description: Load dashboard with small dataset.
Record load time and verify it is under defined SLA.
Load dashboard with large, complex dataset.
Record load time and verify it meets performance benchmarks.

title: Accessibility Compliance Verification
description: Verify that key UI components meet accessibility standards including keyboard navigation and screen reader labels.

steps.description: Navigate through application using keyboard only.
Verify all interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard.
Use screen reader to review UI component labels.
Confirm semantic roles and ARIA labels are present and accurate.
